TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 7, Sergio Mattarella, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1941) Sergio Mattarella mrhuw Italy ta' misuw hya' ga Sergio Mattarella, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, s~…ēer…£io mattarella, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) s~…ēer…£io mattarella mrńßuw italj ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēer…£io mattarella, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 7, Sergio Mattarella, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1941) Sergio Mattarella mrhuw Italy ta' misuw hya' ga Sergio Mattarella, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) s~…ēer…£io mattarella mrńßuw italj ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēer…£io mattarella, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
